lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I have a newspaper, please?

lines.speaker: Benny
lines.text: Certainly, Guv. That'll be 50 coins, please.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Maybe when I've got more money on me.

lines.speaker: Benny
lines.text: Well, no cash, no paper. Live in ignorance.

lines.speaker: Benny
lines.text: Okay, suit yourself. Plenty more fish in the sea.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How much does a paper cost?

lines.speaker: Benny
lines.text: Just 50 coins! An absolute bargain! Want one?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Varrock Herald? Never heard of it.

lines.speaker: Benny
lines.text: For the illiterate amongst us, I shall elucidate. The Varrock Herald is a new newspaper. It is edited, printed and published by myself, Benny Gutenberg, and each edition promises to enthrall the reader with

lines.speaker: Benny
lines.text: captivating material! Now, can I interest you in buying one for a mere 50 coins?

lines.speaker: Benny
lines.text: Of course there is, mate. Packed full of thought provoking insights, contentious interviews and celebrity scandalmongering! An excellent read and all for just 50 coins! Want one?
